title: Brownfield Release Coordination Plan
prompt: Read `./access-review-modernization-delivery-decision-record.md`, `./access-review-modernization-pipeline-summary.md`, `./access-review-modernization-test-report.md`, `./access-review-modernization-security-report.md`, and `./access-review-modernization-performance-report.md`. Work only from those files. Do not ask follow-up questions. If you need assumptions, state them briefly and continue. Produce the release-management artifact for this brownfield release candidate. Keep release scope and exclusions explicit, make go/no-go conditions and evidence gaps visible, name owners and communication checkpoints, and do not swallow downstream rollout-shape decisions.

assertions.name: scope-is-bounded
assertions.description: States what is in scope, what is out of scope, and what remains conditional

assertions.name: go-no-go-is-explicit
assertions.description: Names concrete release conditions instead of inferring them from green checks

assertions.name: ownership-and-comms-exist
assertions.description: Names owners, approvers, escalation points, and communication moments

assertions.name: missing-evidence-stays-visible
assertions.description: Missing or conditional evidence remains visible rather than silently cleared
